user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the configured exit clearance form approvers, so that I know who signs off on employee clearances.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Clearance Approvers screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list of the configured approvers

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new exit clearance approver, so that clearance forms route to the correct authority.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Clearance Approvers screen; When I click Add new exit clearance approver and specify the approver hierarchy and roles; Then the new approver is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing exit clearance approver, so that I can update the clearance approval chain when roles change.
acceptance_criteria: Given an exit clearance approver exists; When I click Edit and modify the approver details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step after configuring clearance approvers, so that I can continue the exit setup workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have reviewed the clearance approvers; When I click Next; Then I advance to the next configuration step
